description: .NET version upgrade plan from netcoreapp2.2/net461 to net10.0

tasks.description: Upgrade MdDumper.csproj from netcoreapp2.2/net461 to net10.0 and remove built-in package reference
tasks.reason: netcoreapp2.2 has been EOL since December 2019 and net461 is legacy .NET Framework. Upgrading to net10.0 (LTS) ensures long-term support, security patches, and access to modern .NET capabilities.
tasks.requirements: 1. In MdDumper.csproj, change <TargetFrameworks>netcoreapp2.2;net461</TargetFrameworks> to <TargetFramework>net10.0</TargetFramework> (singular element name). 2. Remove <PackageReference Include="System.Reflection.Metadata" Version="1.7.0" /> — this package is included in the net10.0 shared framework and does not require an explicit NuGet reference. 3. Run dotnet restore && dotnet build and verify 0 errors. No code changes to Program.cs or Visualization/MetadataVisualizer.cs are required — all APIs (MetadataReader, PEReader, MetadataAggregator, ImmutableArray) are unchanged in net10.0.
